Capture webpages and save with Mybase Desktop 8.x

Webcollect is a web browser extension that allows you to capture whole or a portion of webpage from within Google Chrome and save with Mybase Desktop without having to first save as HTML files and then insert them manually.

Mybase is a versatile free-form database system that allows entry of unstructured text, webpages, images, documents, emails and even arbitrary files without regard to length or format. All information is compressed with the integrated zip utility and stored in the tree structured outline form. Unlike traditional database programs, Mybase accepts text input like a word processor, and provides better methods for capturing, editing, organizing, retrieving, searching and sharing information.

For more info, please visit:
http://www.wjjsoft.com/mybase.html
http://www.wjjsoft.com/webcollect.html
Converts twitter.com URLs to VXTwitter URLS when copying them.

PearPass – A fully local, open-source password manager.

PearPass is a fully local, open-source password manager designed for complete privacy and control. Unlike traditional cloud-based managers, PearPass never sends your data to external servers. All credentials are stored and encrypted directly on your device using strong end-to-end encryption. Whether you’re syncing between your phone and laptop or managing hundreds of logins, PearPass gives you full ownership of your digital identity. There is no central infrastructure to target, no hidden storage, and no third-party access.

Key Features

Device-Only Storage
Your passwords are stored locally on your devices, not in the cloud. You decide which devices have access. PearPass never uploads or stores your data externally.

Peer-to-Peer Sync
Secure syncing between your own devices without using a central server. Your data moves directly and securely between devices you control.

End-to-End Encryption
All data is encrypted using proven cryptographic primitives from Libsodium. No one else can access or read your vault—not even us.

Open Source and Independently Audited
PearPass is fully open source and has been independently reviewed by Secfault Security, a respected firm specializing in cryptography and offensive security.

Offline-First Design
Works without an internet connection. Your password vault is available at all times, even during outages or when you’re traveling.

Password Generator
Generate strong, unique passwords with one tap. Reduce the risks of reused or weak credentials.

Minimal and Fast
PearPass is lightweight, efficient, and designed for users who value both privacy and simplicity.

Why Local Storage Matters
In 2025, a single data breach leaked over 16 billion credentials. Cloud-based password managers, regardless of their security, rely on centralized systems that remain high-value targets for attackers. PearPass removes this risk entirely. With no cloud storage and no backend infrastructure, your data stays where it belongs—on your devices.

PearPass is free to use, fully transparent, and built for users who demand control over their digital security. Your passwords are yours. Keep them safe, private, and fully in your hands.
Download now and take your passwords off the cloud.

Further details of functionalities are: 
This extension has meant created to add shortcut buttons to the main tool, making the navigation between the tools easier, by adding a buttons' bar sorted in submenus (Making the footprint as smaller as possible) to redirect the users according to the necessity, helping to straight open the users profile we are working with. Super Clipboard Manager - Copy Paste History
Clipboard manager & copy paste history tool. Save, search, pin, tag & export text snippets. Free, private, works on every site.

Super Copy Clipboard Manager: The Ultimate Tool for Effortless Copy-Paste History, Organization, and Productivity

Looking for a powerful, versatile, and user-friendly extension to keep your copy-paste tasks fully streamlined? Super Clipboard Manager is the all-in-one solution that transforms the way you handle text snippets, URLs, and code snippets across the web. Designed with both convenience and security in mind, our extension helps you remember, organize, and retrieve all the text you’ve copied, ensuring you never lose an important snippet again.

Key Features
Unlimited Clipboard History
Tired of losing crucial text whenever you overwrite your system clipboard? With Super Clipboard Manager, you can save a virtually unlimited number of copied items. Instead of the default one-item limit, you’ll have a complete chronological record of everything you’ve copied—from short text snippets to multi-paragraph content.

Pinned (Favorited) Items
Mark your most frequently used snippets as “Pinned” to have them stand out at the top of your list. Quickly access these pinned items through the extension’s context menu (right-click menu), allowing you to insert them instantly into any editable field. This is perfect for templates, email signatures, form entries, and other text you need to reuse all the time.

Rich Tagging System
Add custom tags to classify your snippets. Whether you label them as “Important,” “Code,” “Draft,” or “Research,” you can easily search and filter items based on tags, saving you time when looking for that one snippet buried under a sea of text.

Smart Search & Filtering
Super Clipboard Manager includes a robust search bar, allowing you to filter your entire clipboard history by text content or tags. Quickly locate items you copied days—or even weeks—ago, then paste or restore them with a single click.

Merge Multiple Snippets
Need to combine multiple snippets into one cohesive piece of text? Our Merge feature enables you to select any number of items from your history, join them together seamlessly, and save the resulting text as a brand-new clipboard entry—complete with a timestamp, tags, and optional pin.

Context Menu Integration
Access pinned items directly from your right-click menu in any editable field. When you’re filling out forms, writing emails, or coding, there’s no need to open the extension popup—simply right-click and paste your favorite snippets right where you need them.

Export Your Clipboard Data
Safeguard your copy history by exporting items as TXT, CSV, or JSON. You can easily back up your curated data, share it with teammates, or import it into other tools. No matter how large your clipboard catalog is, it’s always just a few clicks away from being securely saved or transferred.

Enhanced Privacy & Security
Super Clipboard Manager respects your data. Everything you copy is stored locally in Chrome’s secure storage—never sent to external servers—so you can rest assured that sensitive information remains under your control. It also supports Chrome’s “clipboardRead” and “clipboardWrite” permissions responsibly, only when required.

User-Friendly UI & Modern Design
We’ve built the interface with clarity, speed, and simplicity in mind. A clean design, helpful tooltips, and intuitive controls allow you to focus on what matters most: retrieving, organizing, and reusing your clipboard content without any hassle.

Optional Cleanup & Bulk Actions
Quickly remove unwanted snippets by selecting them in bulk, or preserve pinned items if they’re still important. Managing your archive has never been easier: one click can clear outdated items, while your crucial data remains intact.

Why Choose Super Clipboard Manager?

Productivity Boost: Save time searching for previously copied text or frequently used code snippets.

Flexible Workflows: Organize large volumes of snippet data with tags, timestamps, pinned favorites, and merges.

Persistent Storage: Chrome local storage ensures your snippets are always available, even after closing or restarting the browser.

Easy-to-Use: Minimalist interface, quick search, and right-click menu integration keep your workflow fluid.

Regular Updates & Support: Experience continual improvement based on user feedback, including bug fixes, new features, and UI enhancements.

Whether you’re a developer, writer, researcher, or casual user, Super Clipboard Manager will revolutionize your copy-paste experience. Install now to enjoy unlimited history, powerful search, one-click insertion of pinned items, and the ultimate convenience of fully customizable snippet management—all securely within your browser!



🚀 What's New in Version 2.0.3
Our biggest UI/UX and feature update is here! We’ve fine-tuned the clipboard manager to make your workflow significantly faster, visually cleaner, and far more powerful.

✨ New Features & Improvements:

Add Items Manually: You can now manually create and save custom text snippets! Simply click the new + button next to the search bar to type and save your own clipboard entries directly into memory.
Smart Clickable Links: Any URLs inside your copied texts are now automatically recognized and transformed into clickable links. You can safely open them in a new tab without needing to paste the text anywhere!
Dynamic Relative Time: Replaced static, bulky dates with a smoother "x minutes ago" or "x hours ago" format right below item actions. We also added a minimalistic exact timestamp directly beneath it so you never lose track of when you copied something.
Upgraded Reading Experience: Long texts no longer expand and clutter your main list. Clicking directly on any long text (or clicking "View Full") now instantly opens our feature-rich Full Content Modal for a seamless reading and managing experience.
Support the Project! ☕: We’ve added a beautiful new "Donate" menu in the footer. If you love the extension, you can easily support the upcoming developments by buying the developer a coffee or easily copying a crypto address directly from the plugin.
🎨 Design & Layout Polishes:

Tidier Interface: Drastically improved the metadata alignment for copied items. "No tags" and "Unknown URLs" are no longer displayed if they don't exist, heavily reducing visual clutter.
Smart URL Truncation: Extremely long source URLs will no longer break your list layout! They are now kept cleanly truncated in a single line.
Consistent Window Size: The extension popup now stays at its optimal, native taller height whether you have zero items saved or hundreds.
The top action buttons (Clear All, Export, Merge, etc.) were perfectly rescaled and flex-aligned for a much cleaner and evenly balanced top-row appearance.

•  Annoyed by copying and pasting the same text from time to time?
•  Tired of storing notes in files and sticky notes?
•  Want to personalize your messages quickly?

✔️ Let us help you to solve these issues once and for all.
CopyClip - Clipboard History Management Side Panel
A clipboard history tool that allows you to copy and paste from your clipboard history.

CopyClip is your essential Chrome extension for managing clipboard history with ease. Designed to alleviate the frustration of losing previously copied text, CopyClip logs and organizes your clipboard activity, allowing you to revisit and reuse any copied content effortlessly.

Never lose important copied text again! CopyClip addresses the common pain point of losing track of copied items. Whether you’re working on multiple documents, coding, researching, or managing extensive text, CopyClip ensures that all your copied items are just a click away, saving you time and boosting productivity.

Key Features:
---------------------------------------------
	•	Real-time Clipboard Logging: Continuously monitors and logs your clipboard content.
	•	Persistent Background Operation: Keeps logging clipboard content even when the side panel is not active.
	•	Comprehensive Clipboard History: Provides a chronological list of all copied text, making it easy to revisit and reuse.
	•	User-Friendly Interface: Simple and intuitive design for quick access and navigation.
	•	Includes a "Pin" options for frequently used clipboard items.
	•	Secure and Private: Logs clipboard content locally without sending data to external servers.


How It Works:
---------------------------------------------
	1.	Install CopyClip from the Chrome Web Store.
	2.	Click the CopyClip icon in the toolbar to open the side panel.
	3.	Copy any text, and CopyClip will automatically log and display it in real-time.
	4.	View your clipboard history in the side panel, allowing you to quickly find and reuse any copied item.


Data Privacy & Security
---------------------------------------------
Your clipboard data is not logged, saved, shared sent or used anywhere but by you.
Extension that allows you to interact with webpages and the browser using your voice and talon or your keyboard

Rango is an extension that helps you interact with web pages using your voice and talon. It does this by drawing hints with letters next to elements that you can use to click, hover, copy or show link addresses and more. It also helps you to close tabs, open a link in a new tab and open multiple link in new tabs without focusing them.
Vim for Google Docs: Supercharge Your Typing With Vim

Enhance your editing experience in Google Docs with Vim for the ultimate productivity boost. Many of your favorite Vim keybindings can now be used to traverse documents at lightning speed.

Key Features:
1. Remapping Support: Remap any key binding and even regular Google Docs shortcuts. Customize and tune the extension to your personal preferences.
2. Blazing Fast: Enjoy lightning quick text-editing and navigation. Built to be as performant as possible, ensuring a smooth experience.
3. Available Everywhere: Seamlessly move from device to device, with support for Windows, Mac, Linux, and available on Chrome and Firefox. Take Vim for Docs wherever you go.
4. Effortless Navigation: Navigate effortlessly with 5 different editing modes and hundreds of commands at your fingers. Become a Google Docs superuser and wizard in an instant.
5. Support & Updates: Caught on a snag, or have a feature request? We’re happy to help you out at support@vimfordocs.com. Enjoy software that keeps getting better, with more Vim keybindings and features always being added.

Vim for Google Docs is an independent extension and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Google Docs. By using the extension, you agree to the Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy, which can be found at vimfordocs.com.
mitekaku キャプチャエクステンション
このエクステンションは、株式会社Ryuki Design が提供するウェブサービス「mitekaku」に対して画像のキャプチャ / ペースト機能を提供します。

任意のサイトでキャプチャした画像を一時的に保存しておき、任意のタイミングでそれらの画像を mitekaku へ一括でペーストします。
(※mitekaku: 画像＆動画への修正指示共有ツール)

◆◆【基本的な使い方】
１． mitekaku の Chrome拡張のアイコンをクリックしてメニューを表示し、キャプチャ種別を選択すると、キャプチャ処理が実行されます。
２． キャプチャ処理が完了後、確認ダイアログが表示されます。
３． 確認ダイアログで[ペーストする]をクリックした時、キャプチャされた画像が mitekaku へ一括でペーストされます。

◆◆【キャプチャ種別】
・[部品選択]   　:　HTMLの要素に合わせたスクリーンショット
・[選択した範囲]　:　任意の範囲のスクリーンショット
・[ページ可視部] :　現在表示している範囲のスクリーンショット
・[ページ全体]  　:　現在表示しているページ全体のスクリーンショット

◆◆【補足事項】
このエクステンションはユーザーのデータをどこにも送信しません。
https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/mitekaku-キャプチャエクステンション/knihldgljmkklphnbelanhngemlcgabn

Umbra Wallet — Private by Default
The most private way to use Solana. Umbra is a privacy-first crypto wallet that shields your balances, transfers, and on-chain activity from prying eyes — without sacrificing speed, simplicity, or access to DeFi.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Why Umbra?
Every transaction you make on Solana is public. Your wallet balance, your transfer history, your DeFi positions — all of it is visible to anyone who knows your address. Umbra changes that.
Built from the ground up for privacy, Umbra uses zero-knowledge cryptography to give you control over what you share and what stays hidden. No compromises on performance. No clunky workarounds. Just a clean, modern wallet that treats your financial privacy as a right, not a feature request.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Core Features
𝗦𝗵𝗶𝗲𝗹𝗱𝗲𝗱 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗳𝗲𝗿𝘀
Send and receive SOL and SPL tokens without exposing the transaction to the public ledger. Umbra's shielded transfers use zero-knowledge proofs to keep your sender address, recipient address, and transfer amount confidential. You get the finality and speed of Solana with the privacy of cash.
𝗣𝗿𝗶𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲
Toggle Private Mode to shield your entire wallet from on-chain observers. When activated, your balances and activity are routed through Umbra's privacy layer, making it significantly harder for third parties to track your holdings or build a profile of your financial behavior. Turn it on when you need discretion. Turn it off when you don't. It's your call.
𝗗𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲
A first-of-its-kind safety feature for crypto. Distress Mode lets you set up a secondary wallet view that displays a limited, decoy balance. If you're ever coerced into revealing your wallet — whether through a physical threat, a social engineering attack, or any situation where you feel unsafe — Distress Mode gives you a believable exit without exposing your real funds. Because personal safety should never be an afterthought.
𝗚𝗮𝘀𝗹𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗳𝗲𝗿𝘀
Send tokens without needing SOL in your wallet to cover transaction fees. Umbra abstracts gas away so you can transfer USDC, USDT, and other SPL tokens the moment you receive them — no friction, no fumbling with fee tokens. Onboarding into crypto has never been this smooth.
𝗗𝗲𝗙𝗶 𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗴𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀
Access swaps, liquidity, and yield — all from within the wallet. Umbra connects to leading Solana DeFi protocols so you can trade, earn, and manage your portfolio without hopping between apps or exposing your activity across multiple frontends.
𝗖𝗹𝗲𝗮𝗻, 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗻 𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗳𝗮𝗰𝗲
No clutter. No learning curve. Umbra's interface is designed for clarity — whether you're checking a balance, approving a transaction, or toggling privacy settings. Everything is where you'd expect it to be, and nothing is buried behind confusing menus.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
How It Works

Install the Umbra Wallet extension from the Chrome Web Store.
Create a new wallet or import an existing one.
Start sending, receiving, and managing your Solana assets with privacy enabled by default.

Umbra integrates directly into your browser. When you visit a Solana dApp, Umbra acts as your wallet provider — just like any other extension wallet — but with a privacy layer running underneath. Connect to your favorite protocols, approve transactions, and interact with the Solana ecosystem knowing that your activity isn't being broadcast to the world.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Who Is Umbra For?
→ Individuals who value financial privacy and don't want their on-chain activity surveilled, profiled, or exploited.
→ Traders and investors who want to move funds without signaling their positions to the market.
→ Freelancers, contractors, and anyone receiving crypto payments who'd rather not have their income visible on a public ledger.
→ People in regions where financial privacy is a matter of personal safety, not just preference.
→ Anyone who's ever looked at a block explorer, seen their entire transaction history laid out in the open, and thought: this shouldn't be the default.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Privacy Without the Trade-offs
Most privacy tools in crypto ask you to give something up — speed, usability, access to DeFi, compatibility with mainstream protocols. Umbra doesn't.
Umbra runs on Solana, which means sub-second finality and negligible fees. The privacy layer is built on zero-knowledge proofs, which means cryptographic guarantees rather than trust assumptions. And the wallet itself is designed to feel as intuitive as the best fintech apps, which means you don't need to be a cryptography expert to protect your financial life.
Privacy should be the starting point, not the thing you bolt on after the fact. Umbra is built on that principle.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Security
Your keys never leave your device. Umbra does not store, transmit, or have access to your private keys or seed phrase at any point. All sensitive cryptographic operations happen locally in the extension. Your wallet, your keys, your funds — fully self-custodial.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Open Development
Umbra is built in the open. We believe privacy tools should be transparent by nature — you shouldn't have to trust us, you should be able to verify. Our approach to privacy is grounded in well-established cryptographic primitives, and we're committed to making the system auditable and verifiable as we grow.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Get Started
Install Umbra Wallet and take back control of your financial privacy on Solana. It takes less than a minute to set up, and once you do, you'll wonder why every wallet doesn't work this way.
Questions, feedback, or feature requests? Reach out to us at dev@umbraprivacy.com or find us on X @UmbraPrivacy.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Block all pictures and prompts from a user in game. Simply click their name in the list of players to hide or show their content.

Stream safer and moderate faster in Gartic Phone.

This extension is a streaming and moderation toolkit built for hosts and creators who need tighter control during live games. The main feature lets you block drawings and text from individual players, especially during album reveals, so your stream stays protected while other players still see normal game content on their own screens.

>> Core moderation features:

- Per-player blocking for drawings and text in reveal/book mode.
- Hide-all and show-all controls for instant global moderation.
- Safe Mode that auto-hides content at reveal starts and during draw/write turns.
- In-game off-stream preview panel for hidden content.
- External pop-out preview window for second monitor or OBS workflows.
- Prompt and reference drawing blocking during active turns.

>> Media and workflow tools:

- One-click PNG downloads for individual drawings.
- WEBM downloads for drawing process reveals.
- Batch download for all drawings in an album.
- Quick utility actions for lobby invite and moderation links.

>> Twitch-integrated control:

- Real-time Twitch channel connection for chat-driven moderation.
- Viewer and host/mod command support for ready checks, approvals, and marking players.
- Visual player highlighting for blocked players, failed ready checks, first-time players, marked players, and newer accounts.
- Players-in-game panel for live room visibility and status context.

>> Customization and advanced controls:

- Custom censor image pool for blocked content.
- Custom background images by game phase.
- Configurable keybinds and quality-of-life stream controls.
A Chrome extension to prevent class duplication when pasting in Webflow.

🚀 Introducing xSync: Revolutionize Your Webflow workflow!

A Chrome extension to prevent class duplication when pasting in Webflow.

Leave behind the hurdles of duplicating classes. Let xSync handle it for you, empowering you to focus and complete what you started.

Effortless Organization, Flawless Execution

xSync eliminates the hassle of duplication and disarray, ensuring your projects are perfectly synchronized every step of the way. No more duplicated classes or disconnected variables – with xSync, your workflow becomes as smooth as silk.

How It Works:

1. Installation Made Easy: Get started by installing the xSync Chrome Extension – the first step towards an exciting experience.

2. Accessible Anywhere: Pin xSync to your toolbar for quick and easy access whenever you need it.

3. Activate with Ease: Toggle the switch in your toolbar to activate xSync and unleash its full potential.

4. Precision Copying: Seamlessly copy elements from Webflow Project A with pinpoint accuracy.

5. Effortless Merging: Merge worlds effortlessly by pasting elements into Webflow Project B with pasting it.

6. Experience the Magic: Watch as everything aligns perfectly with the "syncing" message – it's like magic for your workflow!
